## Release

- [ ] Milestone complete
- [ ] All included issues closed
- [ ] Smoke test done locally

## Scope

- Base: `main`
- Compare: `release/<version>`
- Milestone: `<version>`

## Linked Issues

Closes #

## Time Tracking

- Estimate: `<e.g. 2h 40m>`
- Spent: `<e.g. 2h 55m>`

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows convention
- [ ] Tag prepared: `v<version>`
- [ ] No force-push used
- [ ] README/notes updated when needed

## Verification

- [ ] Build passes
- [ ] Login/logout works
- [ ] Guarded routes work
- [ ] Role rules validated (admin/user)
